feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Event Mesh
feed.subtitle: SAP Event Mesh Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Trigger RAP BO Business Event in SAP S/4HANA On Premise 2022 from GUI and FIORI UI (Object EVER)
entry.content:
Hi

I am implementing RAP Business Events in SAP S/4HANA On Premise 2022 using the following blog:

How to Create RAP Business Events in SAP S/4HANA On Premise 2022 | SAP Blogs

To use the ADT function 'Generate ABAP Repository Object I appendend the admin fields to the table EVER (Contract ISU)

local_last_changed type ABP_LOCINST_LASTCHANGE_TSTMPL
last_changed type ABP_LASTCHANGE_TSTMPL

After creating the BO Objects I implemented the Event ContrachtChanged for the Behaviour definition (managed with additonals save). Then I implemented the logic in the 'save modified' method. I have already done outbound bindings etc so that an event is triggered and received from Event Mesh.

When I change a contract from the Fiori its working fine, an event is triggered and Lastchanged is filled.

When I do so from Backend ES21, the Lastchanged is not filled (as ists not standard) and also no event is triggered.

If I got the logic right, whenever EVER is touched, the entry will also be ‚copied‘ with the mapping to ZI_EVER. But the event is triggered from a change in LastChanged (Etag). And than runs into my derived lcl_handler method.


Goal: I’m searching for a consistent way to trigger the event whenever a contract is changed (fiori or gui)

QUESTION: How can my RAP BO Event get triggered from gui eg tcode ES21.

Idea: Can I use another field as trigger eg. AEDAT ( change date)

managed with additional save implementation in class ZBP_I_EVER unique;
strict ( 2 );
with draft;
define behavior for ZI_EVER alias Contract
persistent table ever
draft table ZRAP_EVER_D
etag master LocalLastChanged
lock master total etag LastChanged
authorization master( global )
{
  field ( mandatory : create )
   Vertrag;
  field ( readonly )
   LastChanged,
   LocalLastChanged;
  field ( readonly : update )
   Vertrag;

  create;
  update;
  delete;
  draft action Edit;
  draft action Activate;
  draft action Discard;
  draft action Resume;
  draft determine action Prepare;
  event ContractChanged parameter ZEVENT_D_CONTRACT_CHANGED;
  mapping for EVER
  {
    Vertrag = VERTRAG;
    Bukrs = BUKRS;
    Sparte = SPARTE;
  ...
    Erdat = ERDAT;
    Ernam = ERNAM;
    Aedat = AEDAT;
    Aenam = AENAM;
 ...  
    CologrpInst = COLOGRP_INST;
    LastChanged = LAST_CHANGED;
    LocalLastChanged = LOCAL_LAST_CHANGED;
    .....
  }
}

Thank you

Till

entry.title: SAP CAP JAVA java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError for com.sap.cds.ql.cqn.CqnAnalyzer
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

We have only recently started getting this error while consuming sap event mesh events in our cap application.

And that too only in some of our spaces.

This is very strange as we have same set of libraries used everywhere.

Can you please help with this.

This is the stack trace

"and topic 'SBN/MIL/inthf/ManageIntegrationLogs' could not be handled","level":"ERROR","written_ts":"1702049700199463353","logger":"com.sap.cds.services.utils.messaging.jms.MessageQueueReader","written_at":"2023-12-08T15:35:00.199Z","thread":"queue:SBN/MIL/inthf/ManageIntegrationLogs - Listener","type":"log","stacktrace":["java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: Could not initialize class com.sap.cds.ql.cqn.CqnAnalyzer","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.model.CdsModelUtils.getEntityPath(CdsModelUtils.java:129)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.services.AbstractCqnService.getTargetEntity(AbstractCqnService.java:133)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.services.AbstractCqnService.run(AbstractCqnService.java:48)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.services.AbstractCqnService.run(AbstractCqnService.java:43)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.repository.HeaderRepository.fetchHeader(HeaderRepository.java:58)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.repository.HeaderRepository$$FastClassBySpringCGLIB$$68c1e6f1.invoke(<generated>)","\tat org.springframework.cglib.proxy.MethodProxy.invoke(MethodProxy.java:218)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.invokeJoinpoint(CglibAopProxy.java:793)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.proceed(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:163)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.proceed(CglibAopProxy.java:763)","\tat org.springframework.transaction.interceptor.TransactionInterceptor$1.proceedWithInvocation(TransactionInterceptor.java:123)","\tat org.springframework.transaction.interceptor.TransactionAspectSupport.invokeWithinTransaction(TransactionAspectSupport.java:388)","\tat org.springframework.transaction.interceptor.TransactionInterceptor.invoke(TransactionInterceptor.java:119)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.proceed(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:186)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.proceed(CglibAopProxy.java:763)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$DynamicAdvisedInterceptor.intercept(CglibAopProxy.java:708)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.repository.HeaderRepository$$EnhancerBySpringCGLIB$$929f59a5.fetchHeader(<generated>)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.service.MilPersistanceService.updateOrPersistData(MilPersistanceService.java:54)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.mapper.MilEntityMapper.mapCpiToMil(MilEntityMapper.java:119)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.mapper.CpiMapper.mapAndFormatData(CpiMapper.java:63)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.mapper.CpiMapper.mapCpiData(CpiMapper.java:45)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.service.CpiServiceImpl.persistMplFromCpi(CpiServiceImpl.java:56)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.service.ManageIntegrationLogsServiceImpl.handleCpiData(ManageIntegrationLogsServiceImpl.java:55)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.service.ManageIntegrationLogsServiceImpl.processCpiGenericData(ManageIntegrationLogsServiceImpl.java:40)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.handler.queue.CpiListener.receiveMessage(CpiListener.java:33)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.handlerregistry.HandlerRegistryTools$DescribedHandler.process(HandlerRegistryTools.java:165)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.dispatch(ServiceImpl.java:201)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.lambda$dispatchInChangeSetContext$2(ServiceImpl.java:170)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.runtime.ChangeSetContextRunnerImpl.lambda$run$1(ChangeSetContextRunnerImpl.java:43)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.runtime.ChangeSetContextRunnerImpl.open(ChangeSetContextRunnerImpl.java:51)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.runtime.ChangeSetContextRunnerImpl.run(ChangeSetContextRunnerImpl.java:36)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.runtime.ChangeSetContextRunnerImpl.run(ChangeSetContextRunnerImpl.java:42)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.dispatchInChangeSetContext(ServiceImpl.java:170)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.emit(ServiceImpl.java:162)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.ServiceDelegator.emit(ServiceDelegator.java:52)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.messaging.service.AbstractMessagingService.emit(AbstractMessagingService.java:132)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.messaging.service.MessagingBrokerQueueListener.lambda$null$0(MessagingBrokerQueueListener.java:55)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.runtime.RequestContextRunnerImpl.run(RequestContextRunnerImpl.java:226)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.runtime.RequestContextRunnerImpl.run(RequestContextRunnerImpl.java:174)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.messaging.service.MessagingBrokerQueueListener.lambda$receivedMessage$1(MessagingBrokerQueueListener.java:53)","\tat java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(Unknown Source)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.messaging.service.MessagingBrokerQueueListener.receivedMessage(MessagingBrokerQueueListener.java:47)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.messaging.jms.MessageQueueReader$MessageQueueReaderThread.run(MessageQueueReader.java:91)","Caused by: java.lang.ExceptionInInitializerError: Exception com.sap.cds.CdsException: Cannot find implementation for com.sap.cds.ql.cqn.CqnAnalyzer.CqnAnalyzerSPI [in thread \"ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-13\"]","\tat com.sap.cds.Cds4jServiceLoader.load(Cds4jServiceLoader.java:26)","\tat com.sap.cds.ql.cqn.CqnAnalyzer.<clinit>(CqnAnalyzer.java:19)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.model.CdsModelUtils.getEntityPath(CdsModelUtils.java:129)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.services.AbstractCqnService.getTargetEntity(AbstractCqnService.java:133)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.services.AbstractCqnService.run(AbstractCqnService.java:48)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.services.AbstractCqnService.run(AbstractCqnService.java:43)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.repository.HeaderRepository.fetchHeader(HeaderRepository.java:58)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.repository.HeaderRepository$$FastClassBySpringCGLIB$$68c1e6f1.invoke(<generated>)","\tat org.springframework.cglib.proxy.MethodProxy.invoke(MethodProxy.java:218)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.invokeJoinpoint(CglibAopProxy.java:793)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.proceed(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:163)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.proceed(CglibAopProxy.java:763)","\tat org.springframework.transaction.interceptor.TransactionInterceptor$1.proceedWithInvocation(TransactionInterceptor.java:123)","\tat org.springframework.transaction.interceptor.TransactionAspectSupport.invokeWithinTransaction(TransactionAspectSupport.java:388)","\tat org.springframework.transaction.interceptor.TransactionInterceptor.invoke(TransactionInterceptor.java:119)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.proceed(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:186)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.proceed(CglibAopProxy.java:763)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$DynamicAdvisedInterceptor.intercept(CglibAopProxy.java:708)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.repository.HeaderRepository$$EnhancerBySpringCGLIB$$929f59a5.fetchHeader(<generated>)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.service.MilPersistanceService.updateOrPersistData(MilPersistanceService.java:54)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.mapper.MilEntityMapper.mapCpiToMil(MilEntityMapper.java:119)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.mapper.CpiMapper.mapAndFormatData(CpiMapper.java:63)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.mapper.CpiMapper.mapCpiData(CpiMapper.java:45)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.service.CpiServiceImpl.persistMplFromCpi(CpiServiceImpl.java:56)","\tat com.sap.lbn.manageintegrationlog.service.ManageIntegrationLogsServiceImpl.lambda$handleCpiData$0(ManageIntegrationLogsServiceImpl.java:63)","\tat java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.ArrayList$ArrayListSpliterator.forEachRemaining(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachTask.compute(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.concurrent.CountedCompleter.exec(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.doExec(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool$WorkQueue.topLevelExec(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.scan(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.runWorker(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinWorkerThread.run(Unknown Source)"]}"

Please let me know if there is another channel where we can raise this.

Thanks and Regards
Vineet.

entry.title: What's the difference between Convergent Mediation Cloud Edition and SAP CPI/CI(Cloud Integration)?
entry.content:
difference-between-convergent-mediation-band-sap-c.png

Hi Experts,

Could you please help us understand Where and in which use case we use Convergent Mediation Cloud Edition and SAP CPI/CI(Cloud Integration)?

We know that Convergent Mediation is used as part of usage and consumption tracking and CPI used for Integration.

We can also use Convergent Mediation Cloud Edition for Integration then what's special with Cloud Platform Integration.

Please refer to the screenshots attached.

Could you please help us by providing some info.

Thanks,

Vinay.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh support for SAP CAP
entry.content:
For now, the Messaging part of SAP CAP is support SAP Event Mesh. We're facing a performance problem because of the limit constraints of Event Mesh with Message through put size is only 250KB/s. So I'm looking for another option, look like Advanced Event Mesh is the right choice. But CAP does not support it out of the box. Is there any plan to support Advanced Event Mesh for SAP CAP in the near future?

Also, if I have to write a plugin to add another kind of for the MessagingService, is there some guide or tutorial to point where to start from that?

entry.title: Get OAuth2 access token via Javascript
entry.content:
I am using below code to fetch the token from Event Mesh server, it succeeded with no error.

However, this token is incorrect, the length is only 1601, and the correct token length shall be 1869.

This causes the next code block of publishing an event to SAP event mesh failed with unauthorized error message.

Did anyone succeed to get a correct token before? Please help, thanks.

const fetch = require('node-fetch');

async function getEMAccessToken() {
    const EMTokenURL = 'your-token-url';
    const EMClientID = 'your-client-id';
    const EMClientSecret = 'your-client-secret';

    const credentials = Buffer.from(`${EMClientID}:${EMClientSecret}`).toString('base64');

    const response = await fetch(EMTokenURL, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
            'Authorization': `Basic ${credentials}`
        },
        body: 'grant_type=client_credentials'
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    return data.access_token;
}

entry.title: Event Mesh details for Customer, Sales Order and Accounting Document
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is there any event n event mesh or any other type of event exist in SAP which will trigger when there is any change in Customer details/BP, Sales Order or Accounting Document.

Thank You
Devavrat Somvanshi

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver Add-On for Event Enablement
entry.content:
Hello,

We are stuck with configuration, basically at first step of RFC destination creation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP%20NetWeaver%20Add-On%20for%20Event%20enablement%201.0/e966e6c0e61443ebaa0270a4bae4b363/92b67c2421534a57827c486637c586e9.html

We should enter two JSON files. One for Enterprise Messaging and other for authorization, but the BTP party does not know where from to take them.

Thank you and best regards,

Michal

entry.title: you cannot access this subaccount because you are not a subaccount member or administator
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

We have newly created a CF subaccount and added a new administrator user into that account.

While trying to access that Sub account user is getting 

"you cannot access this subaccount because you are not a subaccount member or administrator"

And it is not allowed to go to this account.

I have chcked sap notes 

3079819 - Unable to access Global Account or subaccount after migration to Feature Set B

2868508 - ERROR: You cannot access this subaccount because you are not a subaccount member or administrator - SAP BTP

and others but it is not helpful.

If in case any of you have any inside please help here.

Thanks in advance.

BR

Atul

SAP BTP Security SAP BTP, ABAP environment Basis Technology

entry.title: S/4 HANA Cloud Extensibility Service Description; Error while Creating
entry.content:
Hello together,

i have a problem when creating a messaging instance for S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility with the Service Description. I am using the template from here 

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/define-sap-s-4hana-cloud-extensibilit...

I changed the System Name like i have to, but the rest is the same as in the example. But i always get the error Creation Failed with following information: Service broker error: Service broker s4-service-broker failed with: Internal server error. 

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards

Filip Agatic

entry.title: How to configure the Custom Topics for triggering Event Mesh in SAP S4?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement where I need to configure a custom event for SAP BTP event mesh, The approach I thought that I would extend an existing Business object and delegate using SWO1 or create a new Class that can emit an event.

This event will be configured using SWE2 and at last, I will configure the custom Topic. I have followed an existing blog that talk about a similar process

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/business-events-in-s-4hana-on-premise-system-event-mesh-for-custom-events/ba-p/13520889

but I'm not able to follow how I can maintain the custom topic in this whole process.

I request any step by step standard documentation which can help me in this regard.

entry.title: Eventmesh POST getting HTTP 403 frobidden error in Postman.
entry.content:
hello Experts,

I am developing a scenario on Event Mesh and following the blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/guide-step-by-step-procedure-to-send-and-receive-messages-in-a-sap-event/ba-p/13539647

I have created a queue named "SAP/BTP/Ravi/test_queue".

I am trying to post data in this queue using Postman but I am getting 403 Forbidden error in Postman.

  • Method: POST
  • URL: https://<URI from key service key>/messagingrest/v1/queues/SAP/BTP/Ravi/test_queue/messages
  • Authentication: OAuth

Can you please guide me on how I can find what is the issue here?

 

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: Unable to access Event Mesh in BTP Trial account
entry.content:
Hi,

I subscribed to the Event Mesh, and the plan was Standard. However, I didn't see the dev plan or any other plan options while subscribing to the Event Mesh in both regions, Singapore and US East.

When I opened the Event Mesh application, it asked me to create an instance.

FYI-Added roles after subscription 

Can't we use event mesh in trial account?

Ref:

entry.title: EventMesh Issue
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have been experiencing issues in the events being triggered to Events Mesh to CPI from SAP S4 on prem.

Target system is not able to receive the data as CPI is not receiving the events from SAP event mesh. 

We are not able to figure out where and what exactly is the issue as this happens every now and then and not all the time.

I'm new to event mesh, I'm not able to understand how do I troubleshoot this issue as we are getting multiple incidents for having not received the data from the target system.

Kindly pointers on this is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Relaunching Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh – Repackaging Summary
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce that we are launching a new and repackaged version of Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. The initial version of Advanced Event Mesh was launched back in 2022, and we were delighted by the interest and attention it garnered. In our endeavor to offer customer-centric services, we decided to incorporate all the feedback we had received since the initial launch of the service in 2022 and offer a refreshed version of Advanced Event Mesh that can help you in building real-time, event-driven landscapes. This refreshed plan also contains some key innovations that will enable you to build business processes that can help you gain a competitive edge.

All these new features and innovations will be available under the new “Standard” service plan.

For more information on pricing of these new SKUs, please visit the Discover Center. Read on to find out more…

 

 

What’s New?

Our guiding philosophy for this new offering was to keep the licensing as simple as possible while ensuring that all the key innovations and mission critical features are available across the board.

Reduced Number of SKUs

We have reduced the total number of SKUs from 10 to 8, by incorporating the dedicated region and customer private region in all the broker types. In addition, you have a new SKU to extend the memory spool of your brokers up to 6TB in increments of 500GB. Here’s the list of new SKUs:

  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 100
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 250
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 1K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 5K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 10K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 50K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 100K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, spooling add-on

The number attached to each broker size indicates the number of client connections that it can support. For more details on the technical capabilities of each broker, refer to the official documentation on help.sap.com.

New Features and Innovations

As mentioned earlier, all brokers get the dedicated and private region deployment options included. You also get distributed tracing with the newly launched brokers, enabling the admin user to track the lifecycle of an event though the Event Mesh. For more information on distributed tracing, see the official documentation.

In addition to all this, you can also extend the message spool size of each broker in increments of 500GB by purchasing the spooling add-on. This message spool size will be available in addition to the already included spool memory with each broker. For example, the Enterprise 1K broker comes with 50GB of message spool. If you purchase and assign the entitlement for 2 units of the spooling add-on, you will get an additional 1TB of message spool, giving you a total message spool size of 1050GB.

Your Choice of Licensing Model

The new Advanced Event Mesh SKUs will be available on both subscription and consumption based pricing models, meaning you will be able to activate the new brokers on Cloud Platform Enterprise Agreement (CPEA) and Pay-as-you-Go (PayGo) licensing models in addition to the standard subscription-based licensing. This, combined with the hourly broker pricing gives you full flexibility to use the brokers as per your requirement and optimize your total cost of ownership (TCO).

 

What happens to the old brokers and pricing plan?

As of today, we are announcing that we will deprecate the old Advanced Event Mesh brokers on CPEA and Pay-as-you-go pricelists. Following a 6-month notice period, these older plans will be deprecated. Current CPEA and PayGo customers will be able to access both the old and new brokers till the end of your current contract period. After your current contract is renewed, the brokers which you have activated from the older plans will continue to run till you deactivate them. However, we strongly recommend that you consider migrating to the newly launched SKUs owing to all the advantages and benefits that it offers.

We hope you are as excited as we are to experience the new Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. We strive to deliver solutions that can help you digitally transform your enterprise to be future-ready and gain a competitive edge. We look forward to any feedback and thoughts you have on this new launch via the comments section of this post.

entry.title: Connect S/4aha with Event Mesh Sap CPI
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to use the Event Mesh tool to trigger the event.
I would like the event mesh to be called when a material from MM01 is created on S/4hana, how do I connect the Event Mesh to sap?

entry.title: SAP CPI and Event Mesh Connectivity
entry.content:
We wanted to make a connection between SAP CPI(Neo) and Event Mesh, where we wanted to initialize the flow via scheduler, we just wanted to run our flow connect to Event mesh at specific time but what we observed is if we have to put scheduler in flow then used the request reply and added AMQP adapter but it gives us the error stating that "not compatible" . then we thought of using the rest endpoint via http adapter to consume message from EM queue, but we are getting 401 error statating "HTTP method not found" but it working via postman.

Just wanted to know can we connect CPI and EM via REST or not and is there other way where we can use scheduler and AMQP adapter

entry.title: S/4HANA cloud extensibility service on BTP - not available?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm struggling a little bit. I'm working on an event mesh implementation from S4Public Cloud. I'm trying to connect a BTP environment to receive events. But here is the case:

- I already linked my S4HPC environment to the BTP using the Tokens. The system is registered in BTP

My main goal now is to activate the entitlements to use the cloud extensibility. Somehow I'm not able to assign those.

so unless I have not assigned this to  a subaccount, I'm not able to generate communication arrangements and actually create the link to the system. (item 7)

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/enable-events-from-s-4hana-cloud-to-event-mesh/ba-p/13559401

 

Any ideas? I do have all roles in BTP and S4HPC and the cpea credits are there. I watched the tutorial of Antonio @ajmaradiaga  but I just can't get it to work.

All the best

Laurens

entry.title: Principal Propogation, Event Mesh setup and User Context in CAP Nodejs application
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have a landscape with SAP S4 on premise system  -> Connected to a Event Mesh service on BTP -> and a CAP NodeJS based application which is the consumer of the event received from S4 .

There is a principal propagation in place between BTP and S4.

When an event is raised from S4 , it reaches to the Message client in Event Mesh service on BTP. The CAP Nodejs based application is subscribed to the queue/topic of the same. It immediately receives the event and starts handling it in an event handler.

Now, during the processing within CAPM, it makes oData calls to the backend S4 via Principle Propagation and fetch some more data.

When running locally ( BAS ), this works fine because we have a user context available and that helps in making the connection with S4 via Principle Propagation.

However, If the app is deployed on the space, then even though the event is received successfully, the application cannot make calls to the backend because there is no user context available.

How can we make this work? We can pass the User Id via the event payload but how can we create/get a context out of a simple user id and pass it in the header while making oData calls ?

Please advice.

Br

Nilesh

entry.title: Event mesh error condition = amqp:not-allowed
entry.content:
Hi,

Trying to send message to Event Mesh queue via SAP CPI AMQP Receiver adapter and getting the message as

"com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: publishing target (queue:queue_name) forbidden (220056) [condition = amqp:not-allowed]."

Can you please let me know what could be the cause of this queue being forbidden as I can test it locally within event mesh.

Regards,

Abhi

entry.title: Topic Name Queue Event Mesh
entry.content:
hi,

I created a queue on the Event Mesh, how can I direct just one event to this queue? For example, when creating the Business Partner on S/4hana.

I saw that it is necessary to insert the topic name of the queue but it doesn't work for me.

but it only works when I enter * but in this case it intercepts all events:
